questions.q: Write a notice for the school magazine, inviting students to contribute articles, poems, and stories. Also, mention the submission deadline and contact details.
questions.answer:
Dear Students,

We are excited to announce the launch of our school magazine and invite all of you to contribute your creative writing pieces, including articles, poems, and short stories. This is an excellent opportunity to showcase your talent and share your ideas with your peers and teachers.

Articles should be informative and engaging, while poems and stories should be creative and entertaining. Please ensure that your submissions are typed or neatly handwritten and include your name, class, and contact number.

The submission deadline is 15th of this month. You can submit your contributions to the school magazine team at the designated box in the school office or email them to [schoolmagazine@yourdomain.com](mailto:schoolmagazine@yourdomain.com).

We look forward to receiving your submissions and working together to create a wonderful school magazine.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
marking_scheme: Clear invitation to students to contribute (1 mark)
Proper submission guidelines (1 mark)
Timely submission deadline (1 mark)
Contact details (1 mark)
Polite tone and language (1 mark)

questions.q: Write a notice to inform students about the school's dress code policy and the consequences of not following it.
questions.answer:
Notice:

To all students,

As per the school's dress code policy, students are expected to dress modestly and professionally. The dress code includes wearing the school uniform on all school days, with no exceptions. Students are also expected to maintain personal hygiene and avoid wearing any form of jewelry or accessories that may be distracting or obstructive.

Please note that failure to comply with the dress code policy will result in the student being sent home to change into the proper attire. Repeated instances of non-compliance may lead to disciplinary action, including detention or suspension.

We appreciate your cooperation and understanding in this matter.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
marking_scheme: Clear mention of school uniform (1 mark)
Explanation of dress code (1 mark)
Consequences of non-compliance (1 mark)
Polite tone and language (1 mark)
Effective warning (1 mark)

questions.q: Write a notice to inform parents about the upcoming Parent-Teacher Meeting and the procedures for attending it.
questions.answer:
Notice:

To all parents,

We are pleased to announce that the Parent-Teacher Meeting will be held on [Date] at [Time]. This is a great opportunity for you to meet with your child's teachers, discuss their progress, and address any concerns you may have.

To attend the meeting, please follow these steps:

1. Check the Parent-Teacher Meeting schedule to confirm the time and date of your child's meeting.

2. Come prepared with any questions or concerns you may have.

3. Arrive 10 minutes before the scheduled meeting time to allow for registration and seating.

We look forward to seeing you there.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
marking_scheme: Clear announcement of Parent-Teacher Meeting (1 mark)
Proper procedures for attending (1 mark)
Timely information (1 mark)
Polite tone and language (1 mark)
Effective invitation (1 mark)

questions.q: A school notice board has the following dimensions: length = 4.2 m, width = 1.8 m. If 16 posters of the same size are to be placed on the board, and each poster has a length of 0.8 m and a width of 0.5 m, find the area of the remaining space.
questions.answer:
Given: length of notice board = 4.2 m, width = 1.8 m
length of each poster = 0.8 m, width = 0.5 m
Number of posters = 16

Area of notice board = Length x Width
Area of notice board = 4.2 x 1.8 = 7.56 m^2

Area of each poster = Length x Width
Area of each poster = 0.8 x 0.5 = 0.4 m^2

Total area of 16 posters = Number of posters x Area of each poster
Total area of 16 posters = 16 x 0.4 = 6.4 m^2

Area of remaining space = Area of notice board - Total area of 16 posters
Area of remaining space = 7.56 - 6.4 = 1.16 m^2
marking_scheme: Correct calculation of area of notice board (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of each poster (1 mark)
Correct calculation of total area of 16 posters (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of remaining space (1 mark)
Proper units and significant figures (1 mark)

questions.q: A school has a rectangular playground with a length of 30 m and a width of 15 m. If a rectangular swimming pool is placed inside the playground, with a length of 8 m and a width of 6 m, find the area of the remaining space in the playground.
questions.answer:
Given: length of playground = 30 m, width = 15 m
length of swimming pool = 8 m, width = 6 m

Area of playground = Length x Width
Area of playground = 30 x 15 = 450 m^2

Area of swimming pool = Length x Width
Area of swimming pool = 8 x 6 = 48 m^2

Area of remaining space = Area of playground - Area of swimming pool
Area of remaining space = 450 - 48 = 402 m^2
marking_scheme: Correct calculation of area of playground (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of swimming pool (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of remaining space (1 mark)
Proper units and significant figures (1 mark)
Clear explanation (1 mark)

questions.q: A school has a rectangular auditorium with a length of 40 m and a width of 20 m. If a rectangular stage is placed inside the auditorium, with a length of 10 m and a width of 8 m, find the area of the remaining space in the auditorium.
questions.answer:
Given: length of auditorium = 40 m, width = 20 m
length of stage = 10 m, width = 8 m

Area of auditorium = Length x Width
Area of auditorium = 40 x 20 = 800 m^2

Area of stage = Length x Width
Area of stage = 10 x 8 = 80 m^2

Area of remaining space = Area of auditorium - Area of stage
Area of remaining space = 800 - 80 = 720 m^2
marking_scheme: Correct calculation of area of auditorium (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of stage (1 mark)
Correct calculation of area of remaining space (1 mark)
Proper units and significant figures (1 mark)
Clear explanation (1 mark)
